channel.title: UB Analytics · World Cup 2026 Predictions
channel.description: Matchday predictions with public track record.

item.title: Senegal vs Iraq: Senegal by 1 (50%)
item.description: Group I, 2026-06-26, Toronto. Senegal 51% / draw 29% / Iraq 21%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Norway vs France: France by 1 (49%)
item.description: Group I, 2026-06-26, Foxborough. Norway 24% / draw 27% / France 49%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Uruguay vs Spain: Spain by 1 (60%)
item.description: Group H, 2026-06-26, Zapopan. Uruguay 17% / draw 23% / Spain 60%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: New Zealand vs Belgium: Belgium by 1 (66%)
item.description: Group G, 2026-06-26, Vancouver. New Zealand 13% / draw 21% / Belgium 66%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Egypt vs Iran: Iran by 1 (40%)
item.description: Group G, 2026-06-26, Seattle. Egypt 31% / draw 29% / Iran 40%. Predicted margin 1.

item.title: Cape Verde vs Saudi Arabia: Saudi Arabia by 1 (38%)
item.description: Group H, 2026-06-26, Houston. Cape Verde 34% / draw 29% / Saudi Arabia 38%. Predicted margin 1.
